privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires replacing specific placeholders with exact legal citations using Word's footnote feature. The required citations are: 1. Hadley v. Baxendale, 9 Ex. 341, 156 Eng. Rep. 145 (1854). 2. U.C.C. § 2-715(2)(a) (2002). 3. Restatement (Second) of Contracts § 351 (1981). 4. Sullivan v. O'Connor, 363 Mass. 579, 296 N.E.2d 183 (1973). Ensure the placeholders ([FN1], [FN2], etc.) are completely deleted from the main text.
